equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 300 damage, and any damage you take will deal at least 50% of your health.

equipmentMods.trinket: Lightning Totems: Totems strikes an additional time and have a 50% chance to pulse with electricity when struck by lightning, dealing 40% damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Spark: When Sparks collide, they have a 33% chance to spawn a plasma sphere that deals 25% damage . After 2 seconds it explodes for 25% damage. Plasma sphere may consume sparks to gain +25% damage bonus.
equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Plasma: Fires an additional Lightning Plasmas, and deals an additional 5% based on Lighting Plasma range.
equipmentMods.helmet: Summons the sword of the Ancient Berserker. Standing in range when the sword hits the ground causes you to enter Berserker Fury state which reduces all offhand cooldowns by 50%
equipmentMods.horn: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma now grows 20% longer in range, attacks 13.33% faster, and hits 1 additional time. (this mod can be stacked up to 3 times)
equipmentMods.trinket: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma strikes and additional time and deals +10% damage.

equipmentMods.amulet: For every 30 points of your highest stat, gain 1% Damage bonus.
equipmentMods.belt: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 5% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 5%, resulting in more damage over time.
equipmentMods.goblet: Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 10% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.
equipmentMods.horn: Death Blade: Extend the duration Death Blade stays on the field by 1 seconds.
equipmentMods.trinket: Death Blade: Summon a smaller Death Blade that circles around the primary Death Blade and deals 30% damage. Each time a small death blade spawns, it adds 15% damage to Arcane spike.

equipmentMods.amulet: If your attacks hit further than 6 meters, gain extra 50% damage
equipmentMods.belt: Burning Shield: The Shield will stay an additional 2 seconds. When the shield dissipates, it triggers a Fire explosion dealing 40% base damage + 10% more damage based on the shield radius.
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 10% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.relic: Maximum Energy increased by 75%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 10% and radius by 33%.

equipmentMods.belt: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Plasma: Fires an additional Lightning Plasmas, and deals an additional 5% based on Lighting Plasma range.
equipmentMods.horn: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma strikes and additional time and deals +10% damage.
equipmentMods.relic: When killing an Imbued Beetle, share reward with entire fellowship.
equipmentMods.trinket: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma now grows 20% longer in range, attacks 13.33% faster, and hits 1 additional time. (this mod can be stacked up to 3 times)

equipmentMods.belt: Death Blade: Summon a smaller Death Blade that circles around the primary Death Blade and deals 30% damage. Each time a small death blade spawns, it adds 15% damage to Arcane spike.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
